scope: Run a focused enterprise-response discovery batch against a narrower benchmark panel

problem.summary: The expanded discovery batch identified a promising cluster, but it still compared those new domains against a broad mixed benchmark panel. A narrower comparison was needed to see whether the strongest discovered domains actually beat relevant benchmarks.
problem.decision: Create a focused batch around enterprise response, founder communication, and sales / partner preparation, then run it against a custom benchmark panel centered on compliance, legal ops, startup, and workflow incumbents.

deliverables.purpose: Stores the focused raw discovery batch.
Stores the canonicalized focused discovery packet.
Stores the focused hybrid spec with the custom benchmark panel.
Stores the focused hybrid run output.
Summarizes what the focused benchmark comparison revealed.

verification_plan: Run chip-labs mirofish-discovery-batch on the focused raw packet
Run chip-labs mirofish-hybrid-spec with a custom benchmark list
Run chip-labs mirofish-hybrid-run on the focused spec
Inspect whether the strongest discovered candidate beats relevant benchmark domains
